title: core-data-layer

implemented.persistence: localStorage for demo, /api/state retained for normal accounts

newCapabilities.messages: send/list/reply/mark-read backed by shared demo snapshot buckets
newCapabilities.dailyRecords: morning-check, diet and growth actions mapped to existing health/meals/growth buckets
newCapabilities.healthMaterials: create, parse and save parse result in healthMaterials bucket
newCapabilities.consultations: create/list/add-note/update-status over existing consultations bucket with D01 metadata
newCapabilities.reminders: list and mark read over reminders bucket
newCapabilities.storybooks: list and generate from growth records over storybooks bucket
newCapabilities.dashboards: director metrics, teacher workbench data and parent home data derived from current snapshot

checks.playwrightD01: passed: BUGBASH_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 npx playwright test tests/bug-bash/d01-regression.spec.ts --config=playwright.bugbash.config.ts --project=chromium --reporter=line

notes: Existing useApp method names remain available; demo writes now merge into the shared institution snapshot.
Normal accounts still use /api/state and receive syncStatus metadata from persistAppSnapshotNow.
